metadata.task: Choose one way business class ticket from Hong Kong to Glacier National Park on 8 March 2026, offering a 1 stop ticket.
metadata.seed_preview: Unable to complete within remaining budget due to Google Flights date dialog/state malfunction. Concrete evidence on page shows the search is set to One way, Business, Hong Kong HKG → Kalispell FCA, but the date field displays 'Mon, Mar 8' while the open calendar view is on February 2027 / March 2027 with March 8 selected, which is inconsistent with the requested 8 March 2026. Because results were never reached, no 1-stop business itinerary could be verified. Evidence URL: https://www.google.com
